name: Iced Cinnamon Roll Coffee Cake
recipeIngredient: 12 3-1/8 oz reduced fat refrigerated cinnamon rolls
separate and cut each roll into quarters
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Prepare a 9-inch pie pan with cooking spray.
In a small bowl, combine sugar and cinnamon; sprinkle two tablespoons of the mixture over prepared pan.
Sprinkle three tablespoons walnuts over sugar mixture.
Place roll pieces evenly over walnuts; sprinkle with remaining sugar mixture.
Dot with margarine.
Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
Drizzle icing from rolls over top. Then, sprinkle with remaining walnuts.
